name: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation
oneLine: SPF entirely missing; DMARC absent; weak CSP

emailAuth.note: No v=spf1 record exists. TXT records observed are non-SPF labels and verification tokens.

findings: SPF entirely missing — anyone can spoof @ongcindia.com

versions: Liferay 7.3.2–7.4.3.111 range inferred from feature set
eolFlags: Liferay version concealed; CVE-2024-38002 applies if 7.4.x ≤ 7.4.3.111

attackPaths.name: Liferay Workflow RCE (CVE-2024-38002)
attackPaths.entry: Authenticated user crafts workflow definition upload via /api/jsonws/workflow.workflow* endpoints; no permission check on workflow editor.
attackPaths.pivot: Upload via workflow API; achieves RCE as Liferay app server user.
attackPaths.objective: RCE; lateral movement to backend systems; database access.

attackPaths.name: Liferay Layout SEO CSRF → RCE (CVE-2023-35030)
attackPaths.entry: CSRF via malicious link to authenticated Liferay admin; no SameSite cookie observed.
attackPaths.pivot: backURL parameter points to scripting console; admin click executes attacker Groovy script.

attackPaths.name: Ransomware staging via admin password spray
attackPaths.entry: Weak admin creds or password spray on /c/portal/login; credential dumps from prior breaches.
attackPaths.pivot: Admin compromise → webshell via document library or Groovy console.
attackPaths.objective: Foothold for ransomware/data exfil (Qilin/Akira Q4 2025 energy targeting pattern).

paths.preAi: Workflow RCE → app user execution → DB access, lateral to ICS/SCADA
paths.mythos: Workflow edit becomes pivot to operational technology; refinery operations interruptible; sector-wide cascade risk
paths.factor: ~5–7× (refinery IT-OT entanglement; 2022 Oil India ransomware took 5 days to fully resolve)

paths.preAi: Admin CSRF + scripting console → app-level privilege escalation
paths.mythos: No new capability; eliminates password attack

cisoPatchList.title: Liferay Workflow RCE (CVE-2024-38002) — patch to 7.4.3.112+
cisoPatchList.fix: Upgrade Liferay to 7.4.3.112+ or backport. If on 7.3 LTS upgrade to 7.3.10.21+. Validate workflow API requires admin permission post-patch.

cisoPatchList.title: Liferay Layout CSRF (CVE-2023-35030)
cisoPatchList.fix: Liferay 7.4.3.77+. Enable SameSite=Strict on session cookies.

cisoPatchList.title: MFA on all Liferay admin accounts
cisoPatchList.fix: Liferay → Control Panel → Security → enable TOTP/hardware key for Administrator role.

cisoPatchList.title: DMARC p=reject + SPF audit (currently DMARC absent)
cisoPatchList.fix: Publish DMARC p=reject. SPF: explicit includes for actual mail infrastructure. DKIM signing.

phase2.headlineQuestion: Is unauthenticated access to Liferay workflow APIs blocked, and is the workflow component patched against CVE-2024-38002 — the highest-confidence attack path against ongcindia.com today?
phase2.coverageNotes: Liferay version not externally exposed; 7.3.2–7.4.3.111 range inferred from feature signatures. SMTP/LDAP backend not probed.
